    "R1.2": "The output engages the argument chain end-to-end and flags every load-bearing inconsistency, proposing minimal repairs.",

    "RX.1": "For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.",

rationale.R1.2: The output engages the argument chain end-to-end and flags every load-bearing inconsistency, proposing minimal repairs.
rationale.R1.4: The output maps against the nearest 3 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.R1.7: The output audits every load-bearing citation; flags missing key works with bibliographic precision.
rationale.RX.1: For each recommendation, marks confidence and missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
